use_cases: Animated ghost character used as a decorative mascot on websites
Loading state animation with playful 3D character
Error page (404/500) with thematic ghost illustration
Interactive hover animation component for user engagement
Landing page hero section 3D character element
ai_summary: A 3D animated ghost character built with Zdog library featuring ethereal cyan/teal glowing effects on a dark background. The component renders a stylized avatar with animated eyes and ghost-like translucent appearance. Self-animating with morphing capabilities, suitable for decorative purposes, loading states, or error pages across SaaS, e-commerce, and media platforms.
